ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the rental (0-23) */,
  "rented_bike_count" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the rental (e.g., winter, spring, summer, fall) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the rental day was a holiday */,
  "functioning_day" INTEGER /* Whether the rental service was functioning on the rental day */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental originated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the rental */,
  "total_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Total rental duration in minutes */,
  "rental_type" TEXT /* Type of rental (e.g., single, round trip) */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific bike rented */,
  "distance_traveled_km" REAL /* Distance traveled during the rental in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the weather data (0-23) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in 10 meters */,
  "dew_point_temperature" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in megajoules per square meter */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Snowfall in centimeters */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Textual description of the weather conditions */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., winter, spring, summer, fall) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the holiday (e.g., national, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_weather" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record */,
  "weather_effect" TEXT /* Effect of weather on the rental (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id", "weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id", "holiday_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each rental record

Whether the rental day was a holiday

ID of the specific bike rented
Distance traveled during the rental in kilometers
Unique identifier for each weather record

Solar radiation in megajoules per square meter
Textual description of the weather conditions
Name of the season (e.g., winter, spring, summer, fall)
Type of the holiday (e.g., national, local)
Effect of weather on the rental (e.g., positive, negative, neutral)
